pi_items.metadata_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.verified_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.source: FITS headers (TELESCOP: Hale 5m Telescope, INSTRUME: LFC) and Zenodo record 3254683 metadata
Zenodo record 3254683 description ('Sample raw images from cryogenically cooled Large Field Camera chip 0 at Palomar Observatory')
export_result.sh explicitly checks for these exact filenames in RESULTS_DIR

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real cryogenically cooled flat-field CCD frames from the Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope's Large Format Camera (LFC). The data is sourced from Zenodo record 3254683 (Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset). The environment extracts 6 real flat-field FITS files from the downloaded archive to generate ground truth values for median and standard deviation Z-projections. The verifier uses these values to score the generated median_flat.fits, stddev_flat.fits, and noise_analysis.txt files located in /home/ga/AstroImages/flat_analysis/results.
